UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF ANNE SCONBERG'S APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND TRO IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 22, 2013. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 14, 2013 BY 4 PM WITH COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER REMAINS IN EFFECT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-22-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF ANNE SCONBERG APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND TRO; NOTICE IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 14, 2014. OPPOSITION AND REPLY ARE DUE IN ACCORDANCE WITH NEW HEARING DATE. TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER REMAINS IN EFFECT. DEFENDANTS SHALL POST ALL THE RENTAL INCOME GENERATED BY THE PROPERTY (NOVEMBER 22, 2013 THROUGH JANUARY 14, 2013) WITH THE COURT WITHIN 5 DAYS OF RECEIPT OF SUCH INCOME. DEFENDANTS SHALL FILE DECLARATIONS UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY ON JANUARY 10, 2013 STATING THAT ALL INCOME WAS POSTED WITH THE COURT. FUNDS SHALL BE DISTRIBUTED TO PARTIES/RECEIVER PER THE ORDER OF THE COURT REGARDING MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

Application For Appointment Of Receiver And Tro; Ntc
Off Calendar Nov-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ANNE SCONBERG Application For Appointment Of Receiver And Tro; Notice is continued to January 14, 2014. Opposition and reply are due in accordance with new hearing date. Temporary Restraining Order remains in effect. Defendants shall post all the rental income generated by the Property (November 22, 2013 through January 14, 2013) with the Court within 5 days of receipt of such income. Defendants shall file declarations under penalty of perjury on January 10, 2013 stating that all income was posted with the Court. Funds shall be distributed to parties/receiver per the order of the Court regarding Motion for Appointment of Receiver. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Application For Appointment Of Receiver And Tro; Ntc
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Continued To Nov-22-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David M. Sloan, Esq., Attorney at Law, (650-299-9655), for Anne M. Sconberg, Plaintiff and moving party.
Mark Epstein, Esq. of Epstein Law Group, (415-863-5718), for Jason Wong, Defendant and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ANNE SCONBERG's Application For Appointment Of Receiver And Tro is continued to November 22, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than November 14, 2013 by 4 pm with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Temporary restraining order remains in effect. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Russel F. Rowen of Thompson Welch Soroko & Gilbert, LLP (415-262-1200) for Jason Wong and Wanda Wong, Defendants and moving party.
No Appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT JASON WONG's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. Order is signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
